win_condition: Real Artists win if they catch the Fake Artist and the Fake Artist cannot guess the word; Fake Artist and QM win otherwise
message: A Fake Artist Goes to New York is an elimination-style social deduction game. Each round, the Fake Artist and QM win together if the Fake Artist avoids detection or correctly guesses the word when caught. Real Artists win if they identify the Fake Artist and the Fake Artist fails to guess the word.
